titleStmt.title: SII 28.295: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 295. (A.R. No. 449 of 1913.) ĀṞAGAḶŪR, ATTUR TALUK, SALEM DISTRICT.

summary.p: Karivaradarāja-perumāḷ temple, central shrine, east base.

p.hi: Kṛishṇadēva-mahārāja Śaka 1441, Pramādi, Mithuna, śu. 13, Friday, Anurādhā = 1519 A.D., June 10.

summary.p: This record states that the local royal representive (rāśakaram) was causing harm to Dēviyar-kuṟichchi village under the enjoyment (as tiruviḍaiyāṭṭam) of God Kariyavar, the Perumāḷ of Āṟagaḻūr in Āṟṟūr-kūṟṟam in Magadai-maṇḍalam in Malāḍu alias Jananātha-vaḷanāḍu and consequently the authorities of the temple (sthānikar) went in deputation to Vijayanagar, the capital. Amaram Timmaraśar secured an audience with the emperor for them and got Deviyar-kuṟuchchi confirmed as free from all imports (sarvva-mānyam). Apparently the deputation consisted of three temple-priests (brahmins) who were brothers and some of Veṉṟu-mālaiyiṭṭa-perumāḷ of Ātrēya-gōtram and Vaikhānasa-sūtram and they were conferred the right of worship in the temple (archana-vibhava-kkāṇi) (of God Kariyavar). Each was honoured with green rope, a cap, a horse and umbrella. Further as remunaration for their management of the temple, they were granted perpetually 300 kuḻi of land out of the 1000 kuḻi of wet land under the reservoir Poṉparappi in Tillai-kuṟuchchipaṟṟu and 600 kuḻi of wet land under the reservoir of Dēviyar-kuṟichchi, both of which blocs of land were part of the land attached to the temple (tiruviḍaiyāṭṭam of the God stated above). The land was granted to them free of taxes (iṟai-ili) for the specific purpose of management of the temple (sthāna-mānyaṁ) and was also freed from all tax obligations (sarvvamānyaṁ) (of. No. 450 below).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . śrīman mahāmaṇḍaleśvaran hariyarāyara vibhāṭan pāṣaikku tappuvarāyarkaṇḍan mūvarāyarakaṇḍan kaṇṭanāṭu koṇṭu koṇṭa nāṭu koṭātān pūrvva dakṣiṇa paścima Uttara catucamutrātipati rājādhi rājan rāja parameśvaran śrīkṛṣṇadeva mahārāyar pṛthivirājyam paṇṇi Aruḷāniṉṟa śakāptam 1000 4 100 4 10 1 Itaṉmel cellā niṉṟa pramāti samvatsarattu
mithuna nāyayaṟṟu pūrvvapakṣattu trayodaśiyum śukravāramum peṟṟa Anurādha nāḷ malāṭākiya jananātha vaḷanāṭṭu makatai maṇṭalattu Āṟṟūṟkūṟṟattu Āṟakaḻur perumāḷ kariyavaṟku pūrvvam naṭantu varukiṟa tiruviḷaiyāṭṭamāna teviyar kuṟiccikku Aṅkirukkiṟa rācakaram Akitam paṇṇukaiyil yitu kāriyammāka yiṅke vijayanakarattu yikkoyil sthānikar varukaiyil kṛṣṇadevamahārāyar vācalil śrīmatu Amaram timmaracar
svāmi pātamum kāṇpittu tiruviḷaiyāṭṭamāna deviyar kuṟucciyum sarvvamānnyam Āka paṇṇi kuṭuttu yikkoyil yivvem perumāṉa sthānikar Arccanā vibhava kāṇiyyai Ātrakotrattu vaikhāna sūtrattu veṉṟu mālaiyiṭṭa perumāḷ putran tirumalaiyyapar veṅkaṭattuṟaivar kariyaperumāḷ periya kariyavar putran veṉṟu mālaiyiṭṭa perumāḷ yimmūvaṟku paccai vaṭam kullāvum kuṭuttu
kutirai kuṭaiyum kuṭuttu namakku svāmi pālittaruḷiṉa cirmaiyāṉa tillai kuṟiccippaṟṟu poṉparappi Erikiḻ nañcey nilam yivvemperumāṉ tiruviḷaiyāṭṭam kuḻitta yitil yinta muṉṟu nirvvāhattum stānamānnya yiṟaiyili Āka
kuṭutta kuḻi 3 100 yinta muṉṉūṟu kuḻiyum tiruviḷaiyāṭṭam teviyar kuṟicci Eri kiḻ nañcey nilattil muṉṟu niṟuvākattukkum stāna mānnya yiṟaiyiliyākak kuṭutta kuḻi 6 Āka tuḷāyiramum sarvvamānnya yiṟai
yili Āka kuṭuttom yinta sarvvamānnya yiṟaiyili yivarkaḷum yivarkaḷ putra kaḷatrātikaḷum Ācantrārkkakālamum Aṉubhavittuk koṇṭu varakkaṭavarkaḷ Ākavum Amaramaāna timmaracaiyyaṉ Eḻuttu
śrī śrī §
Digital edition of SII 28.295 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
